title: Autonomous Content Engine — Hands-off SEO/Affiliate Site
summary: Fritz's explicit ask: a revenue process he is NOT involved in. He chose the most hands-off seed (autonomous content engine) over ad-funded/audience/marketplace paths, accepting the tradeoff. The engine (scripts/content-engine/) auto-generates quality-gated, niche, FTC-disclosed SEO articles, assembles a lean static site, and publishes on a cron. Monetized via affiliate links + display ads. Production article generation reuses site-studio/lib/brain-interface.js; runs offline with a deterministic template fallback (this container is firewalled).
honesty: This is the SLOWEST, least-reliable money path — chosen for minimum involvement, not speed. Realistic: ~$0 for 2-4 months, then small ad/affiliate income IF it ranks. Google actively demotes mass AI spam (scaled-content-abuse policy), so the engine is quality-gated, not a spam farm. Three one-time steps are legally Fritz-only and CANNOT be automated: creating an Amazon Associates and/or ad-network account, and pointing a domain at the deploy target.
known_gaps: Monetization accounts (Amazon Associates / Ezoic / AdSense) must be created by Fritz — an agent legally cannot sign up as him.
Affiliate/ad networks pay to a bank account, not Cash App directly — the $FAMtasticFritz cashtag does not apply to this revenue path.
Ranking is a months-long compounding game; early earnings are effectively $0. This is an asset that appreciates, not a fast dollar.
Deploy (Netlify/Pages) + live LLM generation run on Fritz's Mac; the cloud container is firewalled.
